actions-list.actionItem: The Speaker announced that the House do now adjourn pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I. The next meeting is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. on April 6, 2026.

The House received a communication from the Honorable Mike Johnson, Speaker of the House. The Chair announced the appointment of the Honorable Matt Van Epps to act as Speaker pro tempore to sign enrolled bills and joint resolutions through the remainder of the One Hundred and Nineteenth Congress.
The House received a message from the Senate. That the Senate disagreed to the House amendment to the Senate amendment to H.R. 7147.
The Chair led the House in reciting the Pledge of Allegiance to the Flag.
Pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I, the Journal of the last day's proceedings was approved.
Today's prayer was offered by Rev. John Kellogg, Christ Church Capitol Hill, Washington, D.C.
The Speaker designated the Honorable Matt Van Epps to act as Speaker pro tempore for today.
The House convened, starting a new legislative day.
